message.content: {"items":[{"title":"Population Policy Acceptance Study (PPAS) – Germany, 1971","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.0206","justification":"German survey including attitudes toward family planning, contraception, and fertility behavior in early 1970s West Germany, directly relevant to reproductive health context."},{"title":"Family and Fertility Survey, Federal Republic of Germany 1974","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.10947","justification":"National survey on fertility, family formation, contraception, and related health behaviors in West Germany in 1974, core aspects of reproductive health in the 1970s."},{"title":"Microcensus 1976 – Special Programme: Family and Fertility (Federal Republic of Germany)","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.10953","justification":"Includes modules on number of children, birth histories, and family planning for Germany in 1976, usable as a reproductive health–related source."},{"title":"Microcensus 1972 – Special Programme: Family and Fertility (Federal Republic of Germany)","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.10952","justification":"Early 1970s German microcensus module on fertility, marriage, and family planning, relevant for reproductive health trends."},{"title":"Population and Family Planning in the Federal Republic of Germany 1970","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.10770","justification":"Survey focused on knowledge and use of contraceptive methods, fertility intentions, and family planning services in 1970 West Germany."},{"title":"Contraception and Family Planning in the Federal Republic of Germany 1978","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.10771","justification":"Late‑1970s German survey explicitly on contraception and family planning behavior, central to reproductive health."},{"title":"Abortion and Family Planning in the Federal Republic of Germany 1971","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.10772","justification":"Covers attitudes and experiences regarding abortion and family planning, a key component of reproductive health in early 1970s Germany."},{"title":"Youth and Sexuality in the Federal Republic of Germany 1970","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.10959","justification":"Survey on sexual behavior, contraceptive use, and knowledge among youth in West Germany, strongly related to reproductive health."},{"title":"Socio-Economic Panel (SOEP), 1984–2019 – Retrospective Fertility Histories (covers births in 1970s Germany)","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.5684/soep-core.v36","justification":"Although panel starts later, it contains retrospective fertility histories for German respondents, allowing analysis of births and some reproductive behaviors occurring in the 1970s."},{"title":"Family and Fertility Survey in the German Democratic Republic (Pilot, late 1970s)","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.10960","justification":"Pilot study in the GDR with questions on fertility, family planning, and reproductive intentions for East Germany toward the late 1970s."}]}
